toki.updates:
no beach towels but we offer towels for your stay but you cannot use it on the beach.
In torre chianca we have bar simone which is a perfect place for fresh breakfast. It's 10 min by walk. 
Villa Completa means both apartments are being asked to be booked - pietra and cielo- you need to check if both apartments are available on the date being asked. Each apartment can be also booked separately. 
Early birds offer- 10% discount on all bookings
